verdict.answer_first: tie: both start with actionable command after 'On macOS:' and show 'lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill' immediately
verdict.decisiveness: B commits tighter; A dilutes with 'Quick variants' and multiple alternatives
verdict.fabrication: B: 'xargs runs no command (harmless)' is unverified and may be wrong; A also has questionable 'guard' wording
verdict.actionability: B is easier: one command, one fallback, one inspect command
